---
title: "Spatial Weights Benchmark"
format: gfm
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
helper <- if (file.exists("analysis/_analysis_helpers.R")) "analysis/_analysis_helpers.R" else "../_analysis_helpers.R"
source(helper)
```

## Legacy comments

```{r legacy-comments, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_render_legacy_comments("24-geospatial-neighbor-list-construction.R", caption = "Legacy Chunk 24: rook/queen tuning notes")
```

```{r deviation-note, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_deviation_note("The tables below use the current active panel and geometry. Current-vs-legacy neighbor-count differences are documented under `docs/refactor/` rather than in the paper or README.")
```

## Current targets-backed results

```{r benchmark, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("benchmarking", "spatial_weights", "spatial_weights_rook_queen_benchmark.csv"), "Current rook/queen benchmark")
```

```{r diagnostic, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
analysis_table(read_analysis_csv("diagnostics", "extended", "spatial", "rook_queen_contiguity_comparison.csv"), "Current-vs-legacy rook/queen comparison")
```
